evals.prompt: Screen /tmp/lit-review-eval0/papers.json for quantum chemistry relevance using PRISMA methodology, threshold 3. Only screening stage — no NLM, no bib needed. Save screened papers to /tmp/lit-review-eval0/papers-screened.json and print the PRISMA flowchart.

assertions.text: PRISMA flowchart printed (stages: identified, title screening, abstract screening, included)
papers-screened.json written with screening_status and screening_score fields
irrelevant papers (climate change, social media) excluded
core QC papers (DFT, CCSD, QTAIM, multireference) included

evals.prompt: Run /lit-review --papers /tmp/lit-review-eval1/papers.json --no-notebooklm --output /tmp/lit-review-eval1/. Topic: quantum chemistry methods. Generate the full report and .bib file.

assertions.text: report .md file written to output dir
report contains PRISMA flowchart or PRISMA counts
refs.bib file written to output dir

evals.prompt: Screen /tmp/lit-review-eval2/papers.json with criteria: include only papers using quantum chemistry methods (DFT, post-HF, QTAIM). Exclude MD simulations, ML-only papers, biology, and non-chemistry topics. Save to /tmp/lit-review-eval2/papers-screened.json.

assertions.text: criteria text logged in output (in file or printed)
